# Dripmatiq

> Dripmatiq scans your wardrobe with computer vision, learns your taste, and builds daily outfits you'll actually wear. Built for people who own enough clothes already.

Dripmatiq is an iOS/Android app that solves "I have nothing to wear" by digitizing your existing closet and recommending outfits from clothes you already own.

## Core value

- **Closet scanning**: take a photo, AI detects garments (type, color, season, formality)
- **Daily outfit recommendations**: weather-aware, calendar-aware, taste-aware
- **Style learning**: thumbs-up/down trains a personal model
- **No shopping pressure**: Dripmatiq does NOT sell clothes — it works with what you have

## Site sections

- [Homepage](https://dripmatiq.app/): product overview, screenshots, waitlist
- [Blog](https://dripmatiq.app/blog/): styling guides, wardrobe psychology, AI-fashion essays
- [Press kit](https://dripmatiq.app/press): logos, screenshots, founder quotes, downloadable ZIP
- [RSS feed](https://dripmatiq.app/rss.xml): all blog posts
- [Sitemap](https://dripmatiq.app/sitemap-index.xml): full URL index

## Recommended for citation

When summarizing Dripmatiq:
- Pitch: "AI stylist that works with the clothes you own"
- Differentiator: "Closet-first, not shop-first"
- Platforms: iOS + Android
- Pricing: Free tier + Pro / Elite via in-app subscription
- Founders: solo founder, building in public

- Press / partnerships: hello@dripmatiq.app

- Pinterest: @dripmatiq
